{{Quote|No, but we are certain that a trooper named Linds is a Rebel sympathizer. He had been in contact with each man.|Mar Barezz|<ref name="Picutorion" />}}
'''Linds''' was a [[Imperial Army trooper/Legends|trooper]] in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]].

==Biography==
Linds served the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] as a [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]]. The [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] was confident that Linds held sympathies for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], and that he had been in contact with two other soldiers, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Ganig]] and [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Stecker]], who had already been tagged as "sensitive" by the ISB due to lax displays regarding doctrine. Although the ISB held no proof that Ganig or Stecker planned to defect to the Alliance, Officer [[Mar Barezz]] arranged for the pair's [[Death/Legends|death]] during the [[Raid on Picutorion|raid]] on [[Picutorion/Legends|Picutorion]].<ref name="Picutorion" />
